description: Red Lion Crimson 3.0 is open. A Tier 1 automotive supplier is commissioning SCADA for a continuous carburizing furnace. As the heat treat operator/setter, configure the monitoring tags for Furnace Line A per AMS 2750G and CQI-9 pyrometry standards using the tag register and parameter specification found in the CrimsonTasks folder on the Desktop. You must only configure the 7 validated Line A tags; do not configure tags marked PENDING-VALIDATION. For each Line A tag, set the data type to Float and include the engineering range, unit label, description, and alarm thresholds as specified in the reference documents. Save the completed project as 'heat_treat_furnace.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\.
